title: Low-Level Infiltration
description: Hire low-level workers in rival offices or infiltrate vendors. Target lower-security portions of competitor organizations for easier access. Build networks of informants over time.
definition-of-done: Hire informants in rival organizations. Different access levels with different info quality. Network building over time. Informant management UI.
testing-plan: Verify informant hiring works. Test access levels affect intel. Verify network building. Test informant management.
